reviews.review_description: It has a unique look compared to the rest. That's about it.

First, thank you developers for this enjoyable game, love its artwork,  presentation and beautiful design.  But may I ask for more please , because it worked , I felt peaceful and relaxing using it every night before sleep.  Music are enjoyable,  more please if possible.

developer_response.body: We are continually adding content. The recent update include a brand new scene in Space. You are welcome to visit and try it :-)

reviews.review_description:
Really well done meditation app with unique, awesome graphics. The developer is absolutely on their way to a popular app. That said, the current version has 3 experiences. One dedicated solely to breath, another a calm meditative journey (with a breath exercise), and an a solo experience.

I have no idea if more content is coming, but what they've already produced is REALLY good, so I hope they have the funding and desire to build this out with more content. I'd buy it for sure. Definitely worth picking up even in this demo form. Very high quality content for meditation.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your encouragement. We will continue to enrich and improve our content, so we are looking forward to meeting you again : )

reviews.review_description: In the japanese room of this wonderful app there are instruments for painting , but i can't understand how use them

One of my favorite meditation/relaxing apps on MetaQuest 2.   The VR journey was beautiful, dreamlike and very immersive.   I also love the different environments where I can sit, meditate and relax.   The app makes me feel very calm and refreshed. Thank you developers for creating such a wonderful app!

developer_response.body: We are glad that you like our app : )

reviews.review_description: I give 5 stars because the app is so beautiful und I could really relax - thank you for this experience. There are some minor things I would like to add: the voice guidance for the breathing does not match the animation (I think breathing in and out are confused), the white screens between the seasons are just too white/bright, please dim them down. I would really appreciate it if the voice guidance could be turned off completely for more experienced users as well as the pointers (like on the lotus or the bird). I am really looking foward to more from this app.

developer_response.body: Thanks for liking Ethereal Land, we really appreciate your suggestions.  We are doing our best to improve and optimize the app. You are always welcome to play again.

This app has three parts at present.
1) Now there are 5 scenarios in Space that you can walk around and relax!! 
2) Journey is a story-like meditation in which you will experience the change of four seasons and interact with the environment, it's the main part of this app(by current version).
3) Breath training.

Hope you enjoy the Journey.

reviews.review_description: Hopefully there’ll be more medication routes

I love that they let you have the option to sit indefinitely in an area and relax, even though there are only two. I hope they add more content eventually, it's very pretty.

The woman's voice annoys me, specifically her weird pronunciation on certain words. Specifically specifically, she mangles the word "Ethereal." IT'S THE NAME OF THE APP WTF.
